UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific personal information, health metrics, and customizable dietary goals.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The user's full name for personalization.

email.description: The user's registered email address for notifications and report delivery.

weightKg.description: The user's current weight in kilograms.

gender.description: The user's biological gender (e.g., 'male', 'female'), used for BMR calculations.

dailyStepsGoal.description: The user's target number of steps to achieve daily.

weeklyGymActivityHours.description: The total number of hours the user spends on gym activities per week.

fitnessGoal.description: The user's primary fitness objective (e.g., 'lose weight', 'maintain weight', 'gain weight', 'muscle gain').

targetCalories.description: The user's custom daily calorie intake target.

targetCarbsGrams.description: The user's custom daily carbohydrate target in grams.

targetProteinGrams.description: The user's custom daily protein target in grams.

targetFatGrams.description: The user's custom daily fat target in grams.

targetFiberGrams.description: The user's custom daily fiber target in grams.

targetWaterLiters.description: The user's custom daily water intake target in liters.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

FoodItem.title: FoodItem
FoodItem.description: Represents a single food item with its detailed nutritional information, which can be pre-defined or user-customized.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FoodItem entity.

name.description: The common name of the food item (e.g., 'Apple', 'Chicken Breast').

description.description: An optional detailed description of the food item.

caloriesPer100g.description: The caloric content of the food item per 100 grams.

carbsPer100g.description: The carbohydrate content of the food item per 100 grams.

proteinPer100g.description: The protein content of the food item per 100 grams.

fatPer100g.description: The fat content of the food item per 100 grams.

fiberPer100g.description: The fiber content of the food item per 100 grams.

standardServingSizeGrams.description: A common or standard serving size for the food item in grams, for user convenience.

isCustom.description: A flag indicating if this food item was customized or created by a user.

creatorId.description: Reference to UserProfile if this food item is user-customized.

FoodLog.title: FoodLog
FoodLog.description: Records a single instance of a user consuming a specific food item, including quantity, meal type, and timestamp.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FoodLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who logged this food item.

foodItemId.description: Reference to the FoodItem that was consumed.

quantityGrams.description: The quantity of the food item consumed, in grams.

mealType.description: The category of the meal, e.g., 'breakfast', 'lunch', 'evening snacks', 'dinner', 'something extra'.

consumptionDateTime.description: The exact date and time when the food item was consumed.

calculatedCalories.description: The total calories calculated for this specific logged quantity.

calculatedCarbsGrams.description: The total carbohydrates in grams calculated for this specific logged quantity.

calculatedProteinGrams.description: The total protein in grams calculated for this specific logged quantity.

calculatedFatGrams.description: The total fat in grams calculated for this specific logged quantity.

calculatedFiberGrams.description: The total fiber in grams calculated for this specific logged quantity.

AIReport.title: AIReport
AIReport.description: Stores the weekly AI-generated reports with summaries, trends, and dietary suggestions for users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIReport entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile for whom the report was generated.

generationDate.description: The date when the AI report was generated.

reportContent.description: The full text content of the AI-generated weekly nutritional report.

sentToEmail.description: A flag indicating whether the report was successfully sent to the user's email address.

definition.description: Stores user-specific personal information, health metrics, and customizable dietary goals. Access is strictly limited to the authenticated user whose UID matches {userId}.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Contains pre-defined, generic food items and their nutritional data. These items are publicly readable by all users. They have 'isCustom' set to false.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for a global food item.

definition.description: Stores food items that have been customized or created by a specific user. Access is limited to the owner ({userId}). Includes denormalized 'creatorId' field for authorization independence, which must match {userId}.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this custom food item.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for this custom food item.

definition.description: Records individual food consumption entries for a user. Access is strictly limited to the owner ({userId}). Includes denormalized 'userId' field for authorization independence, which must match {userId}.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who logged this food entry.

params.name: foodLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific food log entry.

definition.description: Stores weekly AI-generated reports for a specific user. Access is strictly limited to the owner ({userId}). Includes denormalized 'userId' field for authorization independence, which must match {userId}.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user for whom the report was generated.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific AI report.
